title: Legiti Browser
description: Adds a world browser and searcher menu for the Legitermoose server, amongst other features.
body:
Adds a client side world browser, player searcher, random world chooser, and a selection of clientside options. To open the world menu type ```/legitibrowse``` ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b05e546470c86261dde082e20ceaf81089cb5a2b_0.webp) To open the player list type ```/legitiwho``` To open the config menu type ```/legiticonfig``` To select a random, online world type ```/legitirandom``` ## Browser Features Easy world searching, by user or by world name, and detailed world information, various ways to sort the worlds. A menu of all players, with rank information and some other features. 3 different world icon formats and an option of 6 coloured backgrounds. ## Extra Features The `/legiticode` command which automatically opens the browser editor and copies the password. Optional Auto /trigger elytra and auto /trigger beg on lobby joins Hand swing animation for the navigator when you right click Option to replace the big bold [SHOUT] text with a classic globe icon Option to set the compass menu to either the default /play menu, the /browse menu or the /nav menu Option to prefix all messages sent in the lobby with :: to avoid them being sent to discord Option to open the menu listing a players' worlds when you shift right click on them in the lobby Option to remove the /vote confirmation screen when voting on a world Bot related features: a Brigadier-Style command list when you start typing a bot command, and an option for consecutive bot messages to be clumped together. Option to add a Random world icon to the /play menu ## Later Many more features will be introducted once API V4 is out. ## Changelog 29/01/26 v1.0 Initial Release
01/03/26 v2.0 Complete redesign and many new features 08/03/26 v2.1 Added some more features and bug fix 22/03/26 v2.2 Many new features, bug fixes, more customisability 29/03/26 v2.3 Seperation and improvement of feature and browser configs, bug fixes 07/04/26 v2.4 New features, small improvements and more customisability. 27/04/26 v2.5 Small changes, /legiticode command.
